Petition And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jody L. Willson, Esq. of KEESAL, YOUNG & LOGAN 981-7729, for petitioner Merrill, Lynch, Pierce, Fenner & Smith, moving to confirm arbitration award

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- PETITIONER MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award -- GRANTED -- no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
